inject_templates.template: Abduction reported at {venue}. Hostages taken. Perpetrators' location unknown. Number of assailants unclear.
Initial intelligence: perpetrators may have local knowledge. Possible extraction routes: {ingress_vector}. Weather affecting visibility.
Ransom demand received. Deadline set. Amount specified. Perpetrators may be monitoring media.
Intelligence suggests possible extraction route via {ingress_vector}. Perimeter breach risk. Resort security reports movement.
Government/headquarters demands update. Pressure to resolve quickly. Media asking for comment.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when police/command decides between continued negotiation or tactical assault
decision_branches.inject_template: Negotiation has stalled. Perpetrators threaten harm. Tactical team reports assault option viable. Decision required.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when coordination centre decides on media blackout vs controlled release
decision_branches.inject_template: Media requesting information. Perpetrators may be monitoring. Blackout could buy time; release could reduce speculation.
